subject: [PATCH v4 06/11] mm: handle PMD swap entries in non-present PMD walkers

2026-07-13.patch_summary: This patch updates various Linux kernel modules to handle PMD (Page Map Directory) swap entries in non-present PMDs, mirroring the behavior of PTE-level equivalents. It introduces a new helper function smaps_account_swap() and modifies several functions to account for swap entries alongside migration entries. The changes include handling PMD swap entries in hmm_vma_handle_absent_pmd(), madvise_free_huge_pmd(), zap_huge_pmd(), change_non_present_huge_pmd(), madvise_cold_or_pageout_pte_range(), mincore_pte_range(), and queue_folios_pmd(). The patch also updates the behavior of check_pmd_state() in khugepaged to treat swapped-out THPs as still being THPs. Overall, this patch improves the handling of swap entries in non-present PMDs, ensuring correct behavior and preventing potential issues such as memory leaks or incorrect reporting.
